query:
ALTER TABLE change_requests MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'denied', 'cancelled', 'expired', 'pending_execution') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
ALTER TABLE change_requests ADD COLUMN slackApprovalId VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL;
